goal: For me to live a healthy, active life despite my CKD

values.label: Hang out with friends
values.description: I want to hang out with friends without CKD being the main topic.

values.label: Feel heard in care
values.description: I want my doctors and parents to really listen to what I think and feel.

values.label: Play sports & games
values.description: I want to keep playing the sports and games I love with my friends.

values.label: Join in with everyone
values.description: I want to take part in school, friendships, and family life just like any other kid.

values.label: Feel like a regular kid
values.description: I don't want my CKD to make me stand out or be treated differently.

values.label: Enjoy my favorite foods
values.description: I want to sometimes eat my favorite foods — food is a big part of being a kid.

values.label: Keep my kidneys working
values.description: I want to keep my kidneys working as well as they can so I can feel good and do the things I love.
